content_body: Gary & Lissa - We were delighted to see your names appear this time at the front of your guest book! It gives us a chance to thank you for creating such a peaceful sanctuary... We lead such busy lives in Atlanta, and the discovery of Paradise earlier in the year has given us two much-needed respites, the outside world which we hope to re-create many times over here in the future. Finding your mountain home was a bit of luck. For a number of years we have enjoyed the gift of vacation time at a friends cabin in Highlands; recently they moved there permanently and we began our sad search for a new retreat. Online we went, Paradise was found, and we thank you for your gracious hospitality.
title: New Retreat in the North Georgia Mountains
